			"t_o":10.8623,
			"C_o":484.97,
			"a":0.00330362,
			"C_x":585.466,
			"iter":2,
			"sei":0.139441,
			"ses":0.0042255,
			"r2":0.990225,

			"n":55
			}
		]
	}
}
			}
	}
}
